001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Insert;
006import androidx.room.Query;
007import androidx.room.Update;
008import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
009import java.util.List;
010
011/**
012 * Room Data Access Object (DAO) for EggGroup entity operations.
013 */
014@Dao
015public interface EggGroupDao {
016
017  /**
018   * Inserts a single egg group into the database.
019   *
020   * @param eggGroup the egg group to insert
021   * @return the generated egg group ID
022   */
023  @Insert
024  long insert(EggGroup eggGroup);
025
026  /**
027   * Inserts multiple egg groups into the database.
028   *
029   * @param eggGroups the list of egg groups to insert
030   * @return a list of generated egg group IDs
031   */
032  @Insert
033  List<Long> insertAll(List<EggGroup> eggGroups);
034
035  /**
036   * Updates an existing egg group in the database.
037   *
038   * @param eggGroup the egg group to update
039   */
040  @Update
041  void update(EggGroup eggGroup);
042
043  /**
044   * Retrieves all egg groups for a specific batch as LiveData.
045   *
046   * @param batchId the ID of the batch
047   * @return a LiveData list of egg groups in the specified batch
048   */
049  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg_group WHERE batch_id = :batchId")
050  LiveData<List<EggGroup>> selectByBatch(long batchId);
051
052  /**
053   * Retrieves a specific egg group by ID as LiveData.
054   *
055   * @param id the ID of the egg group to retrieve
056   * @return a LiveData containing the egg group with the specified ID
057   */
058  @Query("SELECT * FROM egg_group WHERE egg_group_id = :id")
059  LiveData<EggGroup> select(long id);
060}
